Why Choose Us

Advocacy Built
on Integrity

Every client deserves clarity, commitment, and a lawyer who picks up the phone. Here is what sets B. Garry Stewart apart in Kansas City.

Deep Local Knowledge

Decades practicing in Kansas City and Jackson County courts. We know the judges, prosecutors, and procedures — and use that knowledge for you.

Straightforward Communication

No legalese, no runaround. You'll always know where your case stands and what our strategy is — in plain language, every step of the way.

Results-Driven Strategy

Every case gets a tailored plan. We analyze the facts, identify leverage points, and build the strongest possible argument on your behalf.

Personal Attention

You're not a case number. B. Garry Stewart personally handles your matter — not a paralegal, not an associate — from first call to final resolution.

"My goal is simple: to make sure every client feels heard, understood, and fiercely represented — from our first conversation to the last."
— B. Garry Stewart, Esq.

Practice Areas

How We Can
Help You

Comprehensive legal representation across Kansas City and Missouri. Whatever challenge you face, we're prepared to fight for you.

01

Criminal Defense

Facing criminal charges is one of the most stressful experiences of your life. We build aggressive, strategic defenses to protect your freedom, record, and future.

Contact for a Consultation →
02

DUI / DWI Defense

A DUI arrest doesn't have to mean a conviction. We challenge field sobriety tests, breathalyzer results, and procedural errors to fight for the best possible outcome.

Contact for a Consultation →
03

Traffic Violations

Points on your license, increased insurance rates, and potential suspension — Missouri traffic violations carry real consequences. Let us protect your driving record.

Contact for a Consultation →
04

Family Law

Divorce, custody, child support, protective orders — family legal matters are emotionally complex. We guide you through with clarity, compassion, and skilled advocacy.

Contact for a Consultation →
05

Personal Injury

When someone else's negligence causes you harm, you deserve full and fair compensation. We pursue maximum recovery for medical bills, lost wages, and pain and suffering.

Contact for a Consultation →
+

Not Sure Where to Start?

Every situation is different. Schedule a confidential consultation and we'll discuss your options — no obligation, no pressure.

Schedule Now →
Our Process

Three Steps to
Legal Clarity

We make it simple to get started. No confusion, no delays — just focused action from day one.

1

Contact Us

Reach out by phone or form. We respond promptly — because in legal matters, timing matters. All initial consultations are confidential.

2

Case Consultation

We sit down, discuss the details of your situation, and give you an honest assessment of your options, risks, and the path forward.

3

Strategy & Representation

We build a tailored plan and get to work — negotiating, filing, and appearing in court on your behalf until we reach the best possible outcome.

Garry Saved the day for us. We had made the mistake of trying to get through a bankruptcy without an attorney. He worked quickly to get things straightened out and maintained great communication throughout the process. We are grateful for his help and would recommend him to anyone who needs legal help.
